final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components with labeled part names.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an exploded/disassembled view with all parts spread out and connected by guide lines to their labels
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all major and minor components, each labeled with its part name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include part name labels for every visible component (e.g. sensor, shutter, lens mount, battery, viewfinder, body shell, buttons, dials, PCB, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate part layout consistent with the Sony A7 body structure; all parts must be clearly identifiable and labeled
Avoid:
